code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws_byte(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn substr_eq(_ s: String, _ a: Int, _ alen: Int, _ b: Int, _ blen: Int) -> Bool
  if alen != blen
    false
  else
    mut eq = true
    mut i = 0
    while i < alen
      if byte_or_zero(s, a + i) != byte_or_zero(s, b + i)
        eq = false
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    eq
  end
end

fn get_or_zero(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match list.get(xs, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut starts: List<Int> = []
  mut lens: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws_byte(byte_or_zero(input, i))
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      let tok_start = i
      while i < n and not is_ws_byte(byte_or_zero(input, i))
        i = i + 1
      end
      let tok_len = i - tok_start
      mut found = false
      mut j = 0
      let cnt = list.len(starts)
      while j < cnt
        let s = get_or_zero(starts, j)
        let l = get_or_zero(lens, j)
        if substr_eq(input, tok_start, tok_len, s, l)
          found = true
        end
        j = j + 1
      end
      if not found
        starts = list.push(starts, tok_start)
        lens = list.push(lens, tok_len)
      end
    end
  end
  println("unique=#{list.len(starts)}")
end
